subject: Re: Morrison Job description
body:
perfect


----- Original Message ----
From: "LVJET@aol.com" <LVJET@aol.com>
To: JEEPROJECT@YAHOO.COM
Cc: rkahn@nysgmail.com
Sent: Friday, January 26, 2007 3:25:20 PM
Subject: Morrison Job description


Jeffrey,
here is my plan with Larry Morrison , if you agree.
Larry Morrison job description: 
 
Salary reduction from $140,000.00 to $40,000.00
Full medical / Dental and phone expense.
Maintain his retirement package  
Remain current as Flight Engineer 
-$500.00 per day as flight engineer IF and when he travels.
 
Remain as Director of Maintenance for JEGE and Hyperion Air Inc.
 
-schedule and maintain all maintenance records for G2 and B727.
-negotiating maintenance invoices and aircraft refurbishments.
-coordinates with FAA any new maintenance requirements.
 
I spoke to Larry Morrison and we consider this a change in Job description  not resignation.  
 
I would like to institute his new Salary March 1st. when Gulfstream
 Is back in service.
 
Larry Visoski



 
____________________________________________________________________________________

Jeffrey,
here is my plan with Larry Morrison , if you agree.

Larry Morrison job description:

 

Salary reduction from $140,000.00 to $40,000.00

Full medical / Dental and phone expense.

Maintain his retirement package  

Remain current as Flight Engineer

-$500.00 per day as flight engineer IF and when he travels.

 

Remain as Director of Maintenance for JEGE and Hyperion Air Inc.

 

-schedule and maintain all maintenance records for G2 and B727.

-negotiating maintenance invoices and aircraft refurbishments.

-coordinates with FAA any new maintenance requirements.

 

I spoke to Larry Morrison and we consider this a change in Job description  not resignation. 

 

I would like to institute his new Salary March 1st. when Gulfstream

 Is back in service.

 

Larry Visoski
